item.title: Embracer splits into three companies
item.dc:creator: Jane Doe
item.description: Swedish publisher restructures into Asmodee, Coffee Stain, and Embracer.
item.content:encoded:
Swedish publisher restructures into Asmodee, Coffee Stain, and Embracer.

The split was announced Tuesday morning.

item.title: Sega reports strong Q4 on Sonic sales
item.dc:creator: John Smith
item.description: Sega Sammy posts record Q4 earnings driven by Sonic franchise revival.

item.title: Unity CEO responds to pricing backlash
item.description: New Unity chief addresses developer concerns about runtime fees.
